package.name: HoleRepair
package.description: Detect circular arc holes in B-Rep models — supports both parametric inner-wire holes and mesh→B-Rep fragmented face clusters. Dual-mode detection: Kasa circle fitting (mode A) + face clustering with curvature/SVD axis extraction (mode B, ported from AnalysisSitus CheckIsCylindrical). Rebuilds holes as precise Geom_Circle geometry on arbitrary axes with zero-margin Ring+Pocket boolean.
